title: How I make my AI Agent remember everything
summary: JavaScript Mastery presents an approach for making AI agents retain and recall information across interactions. The technique addresses memory management in AI agent systems.
writeup: JavaScript Mastery walks through an approach for giving AI agents persistent memory so they can retain and recall information across separate interactions. The video addresses memory management in agent systems, covering how state persists rather than resetting each session. The takeaway is a technique for memory and state persistence that lets an agent reference earlier context instead of treating every exchange as new.
